mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hm_query.return_processing_flat ( id, tenant, last_synced_at, return_request_id, order_id, customer_id, customer_name, warehouse_id, warehouse_name, return_type, refund_amount, inspection_result, inspection_notes, restocked_quantity, damaged_quantity, state_id, flow_id, created_time ) SELECT rps.id, rps.tenant, NOW(), rps.return_request_id, COALESCE(rr.order_id, ''), COALESCE(rr.customer_id, ''), COALESCE(u.first_name || ' ' || COALESCE(u.last_name, ''), ''), COALESCE(rr.warehouse_id, ''), COALESCE(w.warehouse_name, ''), COALESCE(rr.return_type, ''), COALESCE(rr.total_refund_amount, 0), rps.inspection_result, rps.inspection_notes, COALESCE(rps.restocked_quantity, 0), COALESCE(rps.damaged_quantity, 0), rps.state_id, rps.flow_id, rps.created_time FROM hm_returnprocessing.return_processing_saga rps LEFT JOIN hm_returnrequest.returnrequest rr ON rps.return_request_id = rr.id LEFT JOIN hm_user.user_profiles u ON rr.customer_id = u.id LEFT JOIN hm_warehouse.warehouses w ON rr.warehouse_id = w.id
